name: ydb-qdrant-code-indexer
title: YDB Qdrant Code Indexer
description: Read-only MCP tools for searching GitHub repositories indexed into YDB-backed Qdrant-compatible vector storage.

authentication.description: Create an MCP token in the Code Indexer dashboard. Tokens are shown once, stored as hashes, and revocable.

tools.name: list_repositories
tools.title: List indexed repositories
tools.description: Returns repositories available to the MCP token, including owner, repo, repository id, installation id, default branch, status, indexed chunk count, and last indexed SHA/time.

tools.name: list_repository_indexes
tools.title: List repository indexes
tools.description: Returns the default branch index and recent pull request indexes for one repository.

tools.name: search_code
tools.title: Search indexed code
tools.description: Searches indexed GitHub repository code chunks by owner, repository, optional pull request number, query, and top result count.

permissions.name: repositories:read
permissions.description: Read repository index metadata for repositories selected during GitHub App installation.

permissions.name: code-search:read
permissions.description: Search indexed code chunks for repositories available to the token.
